summary: Added frame-to-frame EMA smoothing (lerp factor 0.15) for bass and treble values in the render loop to prevent jitter. Added synthetic bass fallback (slow sine oscillation 40±30 over ~6s period) when audio is muted (all-zero frequency data) so macro motion remains visible. Created 6 tests covering all acceptance criteria: bass influences displacement (T-018-01), smoothing reduces jitter (T-018-02), muted fallback produces non-zero bass (T-018-03), max bass stays within bounds (T-018-04), reduced-motion compliance (T-018-05), and no forbidden storage APIs (T-018-06). ParticleField's existing toroidal wrapping + clamping already prevents clipping — no changes needed there.
